message:
fix(conformance): handle search diagnostics and INVALID_PATH error code

After FTS5 decommission, search_messages returns diagnostics metadata
(degraded, fallback_mode, remediation_hints) that the Python fixture
doesn't include. Update normalize_pair to remove ignored fields from
actual when they don't exist in expected (instead of just nulling them).

Also add INVALID_PATH to the error code baseline — it was added to
file_reservation_paths but the parity test wasn't updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
